long long solve(std::string s) {

    if (n == 0) return 0;

    for (int i = n-1; i >= 0; --i) {
        T_after[i] = t_count;
        if (s[i] == 'T') {
            t_count++;
        }
    }
    // Compute sum_T_after_C

    for (int i = n-1; i >= 0; --i) {
        if (s[i] == 'C') {

        } else {

    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {

        max_C = max(max_C, val);

        long long val = (long long)L_before[i] * C_before[i];
        max_T = max(max_T, val);
    }
    // Final answer
    return original + max(max_L, max_C, max_T);
